_meta.disclaimer: Product specifications change seasonally; batch-to-batch terpene variation of ±30-40% is common. T/C ratios are licensed ceiling concentrations — actual tested values may vary. Always verify with current pharmacy CoA.
_meta.tc_system: Israel: T = THC%, C = CBD%. Categories per MOH: G1=CBD-dominant, G2=Balanced, G3=THC-dominant. Subtypes by concentration.

mappings.he_notes: בסיס לרוב הזנים הישראלים. מירסן+לימונן גבוה.
קריופילן גבוה = אנטי-דלקתי חזק. כאב ו-IBD.
מאוזן קלאסי. כאב + חרדה. בטוח לשעות יום.
הזן הקנאביס עם CBD הגבוה ביותר. אפילפסיה, חרדה.
לינלול גבוה + מירסן = שינה עמוקה. בחילות אונקולוגיה.
לימונן גבוה = מרים. לא לחרדה. בוקר/יום בלבד.
טרפינולן + לימונן = אנרגטי. מדכאי-כאב תפקודיים.
פופולרי בישראל. מאוזן התחשות בין סטיבה לאינדיקה.
קריופילן גבוה. כאב + מצב רוח. ערב בלבד.
הזן הישן-קלאסי של PTSD + שינה. ניחוח עשבוני-אדמתי.

mappings.effect: Relaxation, mood, mild pain, sleep onset
mappings.he_notes: לינלול גבוה = חרדה + שינה. פרי-מתוק. פופולרי בישראל.
קרוב למאוזן. חרדה + כאב בינוני. פחות מחקר ישראלי.
המקור לרוב ה-CBD strains בעולם. שמש ע״ש פרחן האפילפסיה.
כאב גבוה מ-THC + CBD מעט. קרוהן, MS, כאב כרוני.
לינלול + לימונן גבוה. שינה עמוקה + כאב. לילה בלבד. פנוטיפ קרם-וניל.
ג'לאטו 33 = ה-Sweet-Indica הפופולרי בעולם. פנוטיפ ייחודי-מגדל.
THC בין הגבוהים בעולם. גלו = מרוסק. כאב עיקש, PTSD, אונקולוגיה.
GMO = GSC × Chemdawg. ניחוח שום/כימי. אחד הפנוטיפים המעוצבים ביותר בעולם.
לינלול גבוה ביותר בין הזנים. ניחוח פירות יער/ענבים. שינה + בחילה.
ארוך טווח. סאטיבה קלאסית. יצירתיות. לא למי שנוטה לחרדה.
Wedding Cake × Purple Punch. שילוב בין הורשת-כאב לשינה.

mappings.effect: Euphoric relaxation, pain, mood, sleep onset

(Grape Pie × Biscotti) × Cookies and Cream. עוצמתי + שינה. פרוטאין אינדיקה.
Gelato #25 × South Florida OG. קוקיס-עוגה. היברידי-אינדיקה עמוק.

indication_to_product_quickmap.note: Quick clinical reference: indication → best Israeli product categories

ptsd.reasoning: High THC indica + high myrcene/linalool for nightmare suppression (evening); CBD-dominant for daytime anxiety

chronic_pain.reasoning: THC-dominant for neuropathic/severe; balanced for inflammatory/moderate; start with balanced then titrate up

epilepsy.reasoning: Highest CBD:THC ratio first; pediatric = T0/C24 or T1/C20 only

crohns_ibd.reasoning: High caryophyllene for CB2-mediated gut anti-inflammation; THC for acute pain + motility

sleep.reasoning: Maximum myrcene + linalool; indica-dominant; highest THC (T20+) for deepest sleep effect

anxiety.reasoning: CBD-dominant mandatory for anxiety; THC-dominant CONTRAINDICATED as primary anxiety treatment; T3 with C18 safest threshold with entourage

oncology.reasoning: Combination approach: THC-dominant for pain/appetite; balanced for CINV; CBD-dominant for daytime

ms.reasoning: Balanced 1:1 per Sativex evidence for spasticity; THC-dominant for breakthrough; CBD for neuroprotection

parkinsons.reasoning: CBD-dominant for neuroprotection + psychosis; balanced for tremor + pain; THC at night only, start very low

fibromyalgia.reasoning: Nighttime: T20+ indica with myrcene+linalool for sleep restoration (critical — disrupted sleep perpetuates fibromyalgia pain cycle); Daytime: balanced 1:1 for pain without cognitive impairment (fibro-fog risk with high THC)

secondary: Cannolam High CBD T3/C18 (adult with comorbid anxiety)
autism_spectrum.reasoning: Israeli MOH ASD protocol: 20:1 CBD:THC minimum; high linalool + limonene for GABA normalization and serotonergic modulation; NEVER THC-dominant for ASD children; adult balanced only under specialist supervision

genetic_identity_registry.note: Canonical global genetic identities mapped to Israeli commercial products. This is the core of CannaMatch's commercial-name → genetics decoder. Each entry is the authoritative genetic_identity entity; commercial products reference genetic_id. Evidence sources: Health Canada Licensed Producer Product Reports, SC Labs California COA database, Leafly Verified Lab aggregation, academic literature.

identities.phenotype_notes: Two main phenotypes: Triangle Kush × Animal Mints (Seed Junky original) and Triangle Mints × Kush Mints × White Tahoe Cookies (Peace Naturals / Cronos variant). Both sold as 'Wedding Cake' — this is a cultivar-level distinction, not a naming error.
evidence_sources: SC Labs California COA 2022 — average of 47 Wedding Cake samples
Health Canada Cronos Group Product Report 2023

identities.phenotype_notes: Exceptionally high linalool relative to typical indica cultivars; this is a defining fingerprint of ICC. Some phenotypes express vanilla/cream aroma from high linalool + geraniol interaction.
evidence_sources: SC Labs California COA 2022 — average of 31 ICC samples

identities.phenotype_notes: Distinctive deep purple coloration from high anthocyanin expression when grown in cold temperatures; myrcene + linalool synergy produces the most studied terpene sleep formula in cannabis.
israeli_commercial_names: Psagot Purple T22/C4 (Purple Kush × GDP cross)
Eran Almog (Tikun Olam — shares GDP lineage traits)
evidence_sources: Steep Hill Labs California GDP COA aggregation 2021

identities.breeder_origin: Florida/California crossover, early 1990s; exact origin debated
identities.phenotype_notes: The most cloned cultivar in history; basis for OG Kush derivatives (Fire OG, Tahoe OG, SFV OG, Larry OG). Israeli market heavily influenced by OG lineage — most cultivators have OG Kush or OG-derivative in their catalog.
israeli_commercial_names: Multiple — OG-lineage is the most common foundation in Israeli indica catalog

identities.phenotype_notes: Two dominant cuts: Forum Cut (higher THC, sweeter) and Thin Mint (higher caryophyllene, more medicinal; better for IBD). Israeli market has both phenotypes under various commercial names.
israeli_commercial_names: GSC-lineage products from multiple cultivators — basis for Cookies and Cream, Biscotti, Gelato, and Carbon Fiber lineages in Israel
evidence_sources: SC Labs California COA aggregation 2022 (n=61 samples)

identities.phenotype_notes: One of ~7 numbered Gelato phenotypes; #33 ('Larry Bird') became the most widely distributed. Flavor profile: sweet cream, berry, citrus. Parent of Ice Cream Cake and a major Israeli market strain.
evidence_sources: SC Labs California COA 2022 (n=18 Gelato #33 samples)

identities.breeder_origin: Mamiko Seeds (initial); popularized by Divine Genetics
identities.phenotype_notes: Highest caryophyllene expression among Israeli market strains; THC in 24-30% range in verified COAs. The 'garlic/diesel/chemical' aroma is produced by the sulfur compound interaction with caryophyllene. One of the most potent pain-relief profiles available.
evidence_sources: Confident Cannabis COA aggregation 2022 (n=9 GMO verified samples)

identities.phenotype_notes: Highest linalool among commercially available indica cultivars; linalool fraction frequently exceeds 0.5% by weight. Classic sedating indica for sleep and nausea. Parent of Wedding Crasher and Purple Zkittlez.
israeli_commercial_names: Parent of Wedding K (Seach) via Wedding Crasher
Parent of P&Z (Trichome) via Purple Zkittlez
evidence_sources: SC Labs California 2022 (n=12 Purple Punch verified COAs)

identities.phenotype_notes: Combines Zkittlez tropical candy aroma with Purple Punch grape/berry relaxation; very popular in Israeli import market due to aroma profile and consistent effect.
Distinctive humulene-dominant terpene profile; unusual earthy-hoppy aroma distinct from typical cookie/dessert strains. Anti-inflammatory profile via humulene + caryophyllene dual pathway.

identities.breeder_origin: GG Strains (USA, 2014 High Times Cannabis Cup winner)
identities.phenotype_notes: One of the highest-THC cultivars in the global market; myrcene-dominant with diesel notes from Chemdawg lineage. 'Glue' refers to the extreme resin production. Used in Israeli market for treatment-resistant pain cases.
israeli_commercial_names: Various — typically listed as high-potency THC product; GG4 genetics available through multiple Israeli cultivators
evidence_sources: SC Labs California COA 2022 (n=22 GG4 samples)

parents: South Asian × Jamaican × Laos × Hawaiian landrace mix
identities.breeder_origin: Amsterdam (Netherlands) underground breeding, early 2000s; popularized by Soma Seeds and Barney's Farm
identities.phenotype_notes: Terpinolene-dominant — one of few commercially significant cannabis strains where terpinolene is the leading terpene. Classic Amsterdam sativa landrace hybrid; long (10-12 week) flowering time. NOT for anxiety-prone patients due to terpinolene stimulatory risk.
evidence_sources: Bedrocan Netherlands COA (Amnesia Haze is one of Bedrocan's registered products)

identities.phenotype_notes: Combines Wedding Cake's caryophyllene-dominant pain profile with Purple Punch's high linalool sedative signature. Balanced hybrid trending toward indica in effect. Popular in Israeli select lineup (Seach).

commercial_product_registry.note: Israeli commercial products with resolved genetic_id pointers. Links the commercial name (what patients see on the box) to the canonical global genetic identity. This is the core decoder engine for CannaMatch's name-disambiguation feature.

products.lineage_variant: Triangle Mints × Kush Mints × White Tahoe Cookies (Peace Naturals phenotype — distinct from Seed Junky original)
Triangle Kush × Animal Mints (Seed Junky original lineage)
Wedding Cake × Purple Punch (Symbiotic Genetics Wedding Crasher)

products.source: Trichome product catalog and public genetics disclosure 2023

products.lineage_variant: (Grape Pie × Biscotti) × Cookies and Cream (Compound Genetics Carbon Fiber)
products.source: Trichome product catalog and public genetics disclosure 2023

products.lineage_variant: Girl Scout Cookies × Chemdawg (Divine Genetics GMO)
Sunset Sherbet × Thin Mint GSC (Gelato #33 — Larry Bird cut)
GDP-lineage Israeli phenotype — stabilized over multiple generations by Tikun Olam breeding program
products.note: Exact genetic lineage is proprietary to Tikun Olam; GDP lineage inferred from terpene profile (myrcene + linalool dominant), effect profile, and phenotypic traits
products.source: Tikun Olam strain library; peer-reviewed studies on Eran Almog: Bar-Lev Schleider et al. 2016

products.lineage_variant: OG Kush × Sativa hybrid — Tikun Olam daytime sativa selection; high limonene expression
products.note: Sativa-dominant counterpart to Eran Almog; limonene-dominant terpene profile (vs myrcene-dominant in Eran Almog); confirms OG-lineage basis inferred from chemical profile
products.source: Tikun Olam strain library; published Tikun Olam COA data

products.lineage_variant: ACDC-lineage high-CBD cultivar; Tikun Olam proprietary CBD selection developed in partnership with Israeli MOH epilepsy trials
products.note: Avidekel is one of Israel's oldest licensed high-CBD strains; used in Tikun Olam's published pediatric epilepsy studies (Tzadok et al. 2016)
products.source: Tzadok et al. 2016 (Epilepsy Behav); Tikun Olam public product library

products.lineage_variant: OG Kush × Afghani indica selection — BOL Pharma's primary T20 clinical product; used in BOL-sponsored PTSD and pain clinical trials
products.source: BOL Pharma product catalog; BOL clinical trial registrations (ClinicalTrials.gov)

products.lineage_variant: Ultra-high CBD ACDC/Charlotte's Web cross — BOL's pure-CBD pharmaceutical product; near-zero THC; used for pediatric epilepsy and ASD protocols
products.source: BOL Pharma product catalog; pediatric epilepsy clinical usage documentation

products.lineage_variant: Northern Lights phenotype selection — lower-potency companion to Eran Almog; T15 for patients who need sleep support without T20+ intensity
products.source: Tikun Olam strain library; published clinical data referencing Midnight for PTSD sleep

products.lineage_variant: OG Kush × Northern Lights indica — Seach standard line (non-Selected); more accessible price point than Seach Selected line
Sativa-dominant (likely Haze derivative); daytime product; Seach describes as 'energizing and uplifting day strain'
products.source: Seach catalog 2023; terpene profile (limonene-dominant) consistent with Haze lineage

products.lineage_variant: Premium indoor OG-derivative; IMC-GAL proprietary phenotype
products.source: IMC product catalog; IMCA TASE filings 2023

rwe_layer_schema.note: Real-World Evidence (RWE) patient reporting layer. Defines how aggregated, anonymized patient reports flow from individual ratings into community-level insights visible in the app. This is the spec the backend cron job and the frontend community_stats display must implement.
rwe_layer_schema.privacy_guarantee: Individual reports are NEVER surfaced. Only aggregate community_stats with k-anonymity threshold n≥20. RLS (Row Level Security) on all tables. No cross-user queries client-side.

data_flow.step_1_capture: User submits a rating (1–10) for a specific batch_id with optional indication_id context → stored in `ratings` table
data_flow.step_2_aggregate: Cron job (scheduled, not real-time) aggregates ratings per (batch_id, indication_id, region) → computes avg_score, n_reports, helped_pct → writes to `community_stats`
data_flow.step_3_serve: GET /api/community-stats?strain_id=X&indication_id=Y → returns community_stats row if n_reports ≥ 20, else returns null
data_flow.step_4_display: Frontend renders community_stats as 'trusted friend' card in strain detail panel — never as clinical evidence

fields.batch_id: UUID — links to specific batch (batch-centric per spec §4)
fields.strain_id: UUID — denormalized for query convenience (joins to strains table)
fields.indication_id: string — one of the indication ids (ptsd, pain, sleep, etc.) or null for overall
fields.avg_score: float 1.0–10.0 — weighted average of patient ratings for this batch×indication
fields.helped_pct: float 0–100 — percentage of reporters who gave score ≥ 7 (binary helped/not proxy)
fields.n_reports: integer — total reports; displayed only when ≥ 20 (k-anonymity threshold)
fields.updated_at: timestamp — last cron update; frontend should show 'freshness' badge if older than 30 days

api_response_shape.indication_note: Optional human-readable note generated by AI from the aggregate pattern (e.g., 'patients with sleep issues reported best results with evening oil use')

community_stats_entity.null_response: If n_reports < 20 OR no data exists, API returns null. Frontend shows nothing — never fabricate community data.

trusted_friend_tone_framework.principle: Patients want to know what worked for people like them — not clinical promises. The 'trusted friend' framing delivers real community knowledge with radical honesty about what it is.

always_use: מטופלים שדיווחו על כך — לא הוכחה קלינית
מה שמטופלים דומים לך מספרים מהשטח
הדאטה שלנו מראה — אבל כל מטופל שונה
never_use: מחקרים הראו (when citing patient reports, not peer-reviewed studies)

ui_component_spec.heading: 🤝 מה מטופלים דומים לך מדווחים
ui_component_spec.progress_bar: helped_pct as a filled green bar with percentage label
ui_component_spec.body_text: indication_note from API, or fallback: 'מבוסס על [n] דיווחים אנונימיים של מטופלים — לא הוכחה קלינית, אבל חוכמה אמיתית מהשטח.'
ui_component_spec.footer: כל הדאטה מצטבר ואנונימי. מוצג רק כשיש ≥20 דיווחים.

ai_agent_rules.rule_10: כלל החבר המהימן — RWE: כשמציג נתוני קהילה, השתמש תמיד בניסוח 'מטופלים שדיווחו' לא 'מחקרים'. לעולם לא 'מוכח'.
ai_agent_rules.community_signal_weight: Community data is contextual signal, not override. If community_stats contradicts clinical indication data, present both: 'המחקר מצביע על X, ומטופלים מהקהילה שלנו מדווחים Y — שתיהן תובנות ערכיות.'

three_layer_producer_model.note: The Israeli medical cannabis market operates on a three-layer commercial resolution. Every product on a patient's prescription can be decomposed into these three distinct entities. CannaMatch uses this model to resolve commercial names → genetics and to flag cases where the same genetic identity is sold under different names by different producers.

layer_1_producer.definition: The entity holding the Israeli MOH cannabis cultivation license (domestic) or import license (foreign flower). This is the legal responsible party. May or may not appear on the patient box.

layer_2_brand.definition: The marketing and labeling entity. For domestic producers, this often equals Layer 1. For imported/white-labeled products, the brand is Israeli but the producer is foreign. The brand name appears on the box and in pharmacy systems.

brand_over_foreign_producer: Peace Naturals (brand) over Cronos Group Canada (producer)
Canndoc Humboldt (brand) over Humboldt Seed Organization genetics
EDISON (brand) over Organigram Canada (producer) via IMC import

layer_3_sku.definition: The specific commercial name printed on the prescription box — the product the patient and pharmacist work with. This is the string in pharmacy inventory systems and what patients search. Example: 'Wedding CK', 'P&Z', 'Eran Almog', 'Carbo'.
layer_3_sku.pharmacy_system_note: Israeli pharmacy dispensing systems (Katom, etc.) use the commercial name as the primary identifier. The same commercial name from different pharmacies may reference different production batches with different terpene profiles — this is the core problem CannaMatch solves.

resolved_examples.cannamatch_decodes_to: Wedding Cake genetics = Triangle Mints × Kush Mints × White Tahoe Cookies (Peace Naturals phenotype)
Purple Zkittlez genetics = Purple Punch × Zkittlez

resolved_examples.layer_1_producer: IMC-GAL Ltd. (Israel, importer of Organigram products)
resolved_examples.cannamatch_decodes_to: Canadian-bred genetics (Organigram); genetics depend on specific SKU
Wedding Crasher genetics = Wedding Cake × Purple Punch — NOT Wedding Cake despite the name similarity

three_layer_producer_model.cannamatch_core_value: Without CannaMatch, a patient who receives 'Wedding CK' (Cronos) and 'The Wedding Cake' (Canndoc) and 'Wedding K' (Seach) has no way to know they are receiving three related but distinct genetic products. CannaMatch maps all three to the same genetic_identity_registry family (wedding-cake / wedding-crasher) and decodes the actual lineage differences.

import_supply_chain.note: Foreign-to-Israeli supply chain mappings. Documented import pathways from international producers into the Israeli medical cannabis market. All entries based on public information: press releases, regulatory filings, and licensed producer reports. Confidence ratings applied per entry.
import_supply_chain.regulatory_framework: Israeli MOH Import License Framework: foreign flower must be GMP-certified (EU-GMP or equivalent). Importer holds Israeli MOH import license. All foreign products must pass Israeli MOH quality control on arrival. T/C categorization is assigned by Israeli laboratory testing — original foreign label may differ.

pathways.source: Cronos Group annual reports; public Israeli pharmacy listings; Cronos Group press releases 2019-2023
Organigram Holdings press release March 2021; IMC-GAL TASE filings

pathways.import_vehicle: IMC-GAL vertically integrated reverse-import (Israeli company owns foreign cultivation)
known_products_in_israel: IMC-sourced EU GMP flower products; IMC CBD T1/C20
pathways.source: IMC-GAL TASE annual reports 2021-2023; IMC investor presentations

pathways.producer_gmp_status: Dutch Office for Medicinal Cannabis (OMC) licensed; EU GMP
pathways.import_vehicle: Pharmaceutical import license (hospitals and specialized pharmacies)
known_products_in_israel: Bedrocan (22% THC, <1% CBD, flos — granulate or flos form)
pathways.note: Bedrocan products are standardized pharmacopoeia cannabis — the most precisely characterized cannabis available. Available in Israel through specialized hospital pharmacy dispensing for specific patient groups.
pathways.source: Bedrocan International product catalog; Dutch OMC records; Israeli MOH import approvals

pathways.producer_gmp_status: Health Canada licensed; EU-GMP via Aurora Nordic
pathways.import_vehicle: Aurora international division; historical MedReleaf Israel relationship (pre-2018 acquisition)
pathways.source: Aurora Cannabis international market filings; industry conference disclosures iCAN 2022

pathways.producer_gmp_status: Health Canada licensed; EU GMP (Tilray Portugal)
pathways.israeli_importer_brand: Various (Nuuvera was Tilray's international distribution arm before integration)
pathways.import_vehicle: Nuuvera international operations (now integrated into Tilray Brands)
pathways.source: Nuuvera international operations reports 2017-2019; Tilray investor filings

fuzzy_match_alias_matrix.note: Comprehensive alias and normalization table for Israeli pharmacy menu parsing. Covers: (1) Hebrew phonetic transliterations of English strain names, (2) common typos and spelling variants, (3) abbreviations used in pharmacy dispensing systems, (4) legacy pre-regulation slang from Israeli Telegrass/street culture, (5) partial names and truncations. Used by the menu-parse endpoint (api/routes/menu.js) and the normalization engine (api/lib/normalization.js).

normalization_rules.step_1: Lowercase and strip diacritics/geresh from Hebrew input
normalization_rules.step_3: Match against canonical_norm field using trigram similarity (threshold 0.65)
normalization_rules.step_4: Fall back to Levenshtein distance ≤ 2 on normalized token set
normalization_rules.step_5: If still unmatched, send to ai-genetics-inference.js for LLM fallback

israeli_slang_legacy_table.note: Pre-regulation Telegrass-era and Israeli street slang names that still appear in patient conversations and older pharmacy record systems. Not used as canonical names; mapped to nearest genetic identity for the scoring engine.

mappings.context: OG Kush was commonly referred to as 'Five Stars' in pre-regulation Israeli market
Any high-CBD, lightly colored strain; approximate match only
Floral, high-linalool strain; most often Purple Punch or similar
Afghani landrace or Afghani-derived heavy indica
Heavy indica, Afghani-origin; archaic Israeli slang
Northern Lights or similar European-bred indica; cold-climate association
High-limonene sativa; often Amnesia Haze or Lemon Haze
Pink Cookies / Wedding Cake — 'pink' associated with its alternate name Pink Cookies
Ice Cream Cake — direct Hebrew translation used by patients
Any Wedding-lineage strain — Wedding Cake, Wedding Crasher, Wedding K; disambiguation requires producer context
